examples: Have two names: the official English name ASSAM and the Assamese local name OXOM.
In neighboring India, speakers of Bengali and Assamese use the term taka to refer to the Indian Rupee.
The lawyer for an Assamese murderer says of these repeated, last-minute postponements: "You are virtually killing him every day."
Boys in red-striped Assamese robes wander town, beating out tribal rhythms on their drums for anyone who will listen.
